messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section text:
## 小游戏与APP正在重新构建“多端协同”战略

message.content:
This section heading outlines a strategic shift in digital product ecosystems. It can answer the following retrieval questions:
- **Topics & Claims:** What emerging strategy is reshaping the relationship between mini-games and applications? (They are reconstructing a "multi-terminal collaboration" strategy.)
- **Entities:** Which core digital products are central to this strategic realignment? (Mini-games and APPs.)
- **Dates, Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, & Evidence Types:** None provided. The text consists solely of a title and contains no specific timelines, operational definitions, implementation steps, quantitative data, visual references, or supporting evidence.
- **Location:** Page 37.
Retrieval queries targeting cross-platform strategy, mini-game/APP integration, or multi-terminal ecosystem development will match this section. Detailed questions regarding execution, performance benchmarks, or case studies require the full section content.
